ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content piece */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL linking to the content */,
  "num_points" INTEGER /* Number of points or upvotes the content has received */,
  "num_comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was created */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., article, video, interactive media) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the content belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Total number of shares */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, content creator, regular user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "total_content_created" INTEGER /* Total number of content pieces created by the user */,
  "total_engagements" INTEGER /* Total number of engagements with the user's content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the comment */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the tag belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_tags" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content piece */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag attached to the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user engaging with the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being engaged with */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., view, share, like) */,
  "engaged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the engagement */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the engagement */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_engagement_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was read */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the content */,
  "viewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the content */,
  "liked_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was liked */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the like */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for liking the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the content */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the content was shared */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the share */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for sharing the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shares_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
